name: Mitachi Co., Ltd.
summary: Mitachi Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an electronics trading company in Japan and internationally. It sells electronics devices, such as semiconductors, LCDs, etc., as well as electronics components and motors for various electronics industries, such as car electronics, amusement equipment, industrial equipment, consumer equipment, communication equipment, and others. The company also manufactures and sells electronic devices and modules; and sells assembly equipment for electronic devices, such as SMT lines, inspection systems, etc. Mitachi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
